meaning: n.夹子,回形针,子弹夹vt.夹住,剪短,修剪
examples: She took the clip out of her hair.
He gave the hedge a clip.
Here is a clip from her latest movie.
They couldn't quite understand why Muto was there for making a copy of a Gingrich clip.
After stalling in 1999 and 2000, Lazy Days' sales have since grown at a 16% clip.
